finding.summary: The track has a dark, bass-heavy tonal balance.
finding.probable_cause: The source synth patch lacks high-frequency content; the spectrum rolls off significantly from 100 Hz to 4 kHz.
finding.confidence_reason: 1/3-octave spectrum shows clear level decline: 100 Hz -18 dBFS, 1 kHz -24 dBFS, 4 kHz -30 dBFS. Silence fraction is low (0.05), so levels are representative.

proposal.reason: No EQ or processing plugins exist on this track to adjust the tonal balance. Adding an EQ would be required, which is outside the scope of available operations (volume, pan, FX parameter/bypass).
